```
- name: ADDITIONAL_CONFIG_FOLLOW_AMULET_CONVERSION_RATE_FEED
  value: |
    canton.sv-apps.sv.follow-amulet-conversion-rate-feed {
      publisher = "publisher::namespace"
      accepted-range = {
        min = 0.01
        max = 100.0
      }
    }
```
